name: The Hunger Games
description: Suzanne Collins's YA dystopia — Panem, the annual Games, and the Girl on Fire.

questions.q: Who is the heroine and narrator of The Hunger Games trilogy?

source.notes: A 16-year-old from District 12.

questions.q: In which district of Panem does Katniss live?

source.notes: The poorest coal-mining district.

questions.q: At the Reaping, Katniss volunteers to spare which family member?

source.notes: Prim is chosen first; Katniss volunteers.

questions.q: Who is the boy tribute from District 12 in the 74th Hunger Games?

source.notes: Son of a baker; uses camouflage skills.

questions.q: What is Katniss's preferred weapon?

source.notes: Katniss hunts for her family in District 12.

questions.q: Who plays Katniss in the film adaptations?

source.notes: Lawrence won Best Actress for Silver Linings Playbook during the franchise run.

questions.q: Who authored The Hunger Games trilogy?

source.notes: First novel published 2008.

questions.q: What is the name of Panem's glittering, decadent city where the President and wealthy elite live?

source.notes: Located in the Rocky Mountains of former-US Colorado.

questions.q: Who is Panem's tyrannical president and primary antagonist?

source.notes: Coriolanus Snow; played by Donald Sutherland in the films.

questions.q: What is the name of Katniss's mentor, a former District 12 victor?

source.notes: Played by Woody Harrelson.

questions.q: Who is Katniss's District 12 escort, known for her bright Capitol wigs?

source.notes: Played by Elizabeth Banks.

questions.q: Who is Katniss's District 12 stylist, who ultimately gives her the 'Girl on Fire' look?

source.notes: Played by Lenny Kravitz.

questions.q: Who is Katniss's best friend and hunting partner in District 12?

source.notes: Played by Liam Hemsworth.

questions.q: What pin becomes the symbol of Katniss and later the rebellion?

source.notes: Mockingjay — a hybrid of mockingbirds and jabberjays.

questions.q: Which young District 11 tribute befriends Katniss in the arena?

source.notes: Rue's death inspires Katniss to place flowers around her body.

questions.q: The 75th Hunger Games in Catching Fire is a special edition called a what?

source.notes: Every 25th Games features a special twist.

questions.q: In the 75th Hunger Games, the twist is that tributes are drawn from whom?

source.notes: Forcing Katniss back into the arena.

questions.q: What is the title of the third and final book in the original trilogy?

source.notes: Mockingjay, 2010.

questions.q: Suzanne Collins's 2020 prequel novel focuses on a young version of which character?

source.original_a: The Ballad of Songbirds and Snakes
source.notes: The prequel: 'The Ballad of Songbirds and Snakes.'

questions.q: What is the full title of the 2020 prequel novel?

source.original_a: The Ballad of Songbirds and Snakes
source.notes: Film adaptation released November 2023.

questions.q: Which Oscar-winning director of films 2-4 of the Hunger Games series directed Catching Fire?

source.notes: Gary Ross directed the first film only.

questions.q: Which grizzled rebel leader in District 13 is played by Julianne Moore in the Mockingjay films?

source.notes: Moore's character is pivotal in the ending.
